# IR (C13) brightness temp (K) -> R G B. Format like radarscope_dbz.txt (value R G B).
# 180 = no data (transparent). 200K = cold clouds (white). 300K = warm surface (black).
180 0 0 0 0
200 255 255 255
205 242 242 242
210 229 229 229
215 217 217 217
220 204 204 204
225 191 191 191
230 179 179 179
235 166 166 166
240 153 153 153
245 140 140 140
250 128 128 128
255 115 115 115
260 0 0 0 0
265 0 0 0 0
270 0 0 0 0
275 0 0 0 0
280 0 0 0 0
285 0 0 0 0
290 0 0 0 0
295 0 0 0 0
300 0 0 0 0
